description:
State machine-driven workflow engine with composable YAML pipelines.

## Phase 1: State Machine as Routing Layer — COMPLETED
All 5 items implemented via TASK-167 through TASK-171:
1. ID-based phase transitions (TASK-167) — replaced current_phase_index with ID-based lookup
2. on_verdict routing (TASK-168) — per-phase config declaring verdict-to-target routing
3. skip_if conditions (TASK-169) — per-phase guards evaluated against task context
4. HumanEscalated state (TASK-170) — distinct from Paused/Failed, entered on rework budget exceeded
5. Per-phase retry config (TASK-171) — max_attempts and retry_backoff configurable per phase

## Phase 2: YAML Surface and Composability — COMPLETED
All 3 items implemented via TASK-172 through TASK-174:
6. YAML workflow definitions (TASK-172) — ao.workflows.yaml compiles to internal JSON, sub-pipeline composition supported
7. Cross-phase data passing (TASK-173) — phase outputs persisted and injected via __PRIOR_PHASE_OUTPUTS__
8. Command-mode phases (TASK-174) — shell command phases with exit code + stdout as output

## Phase 3: Advanced Patterns — NOT STARTED (no tasks created)
9. Parallel phase execution: depends_on for DAG-style concurrency
10. Trigger declarations: on: push, on: pr_opened, on: schedule for event-driven dispatch
11. Loop constructs: Bounded iteration with exit conditions
title: State Machine-Driven Workflow Engine with Composable YAML Pipelines
